title: Bug Crawling on a Rotating Disk
body: A bug of mass $$0.020$$ kg is at rest on the edge of a solid cylindrical disk $$(M=0.10$$ kg, $$R=0.10$$ $$m$$, I=(1/2)*M*R**2) rotating in a horizontal plane around the vertical axis through its center. The disk is rotating at $$10.0$$ $$\frac{rad}{s}$$. The bug crawls to the center of the disk.
